'''鈭歜-v-s-d''' ('''kabavsedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hemodilute|hemodilute]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hemodilute|hemodilute]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-v-s-d
|-
! Lemma
| kabavsedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibavsedoko|thibavsedoko]] || [[word:jibavsedoko|jibavsedoko]] || [[word:shibavsedoko|shibavsedoko]] || [[word:kibavsedoko|kibavsedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubavsedoko|thuthubavsedoko]] || [[word:jujubavsedoko|jujubavsedoko]] || [[word:shushubavsedoko|shushubavsedoko]] || [[word:kukubavsedoko|kukubavsedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
